close_reason: Implemented Config module with backend/0, bootstrap_key/0, bootstrap_key!/0. Added discover/1 convenience wrapper to Discovery.
description: Define how to configure the ObjectStorage backend at startup. Options: application env, startup args, hybrid. Need to solve chicken-and-egg for cold start (need config to read config). Should support LocalFilesystem for dev/test and S3/GCS for production.
title: ObjectStorage backend configuration
